title: Contact WagerProof support
description: How to reach the WagerProof support team for help with your account or the app.

content.text: If you can't find an answer in this support center, you can reach our team directly.
Send an email to support@wagerproof.bet with a description of your issue. Include your account email and any relevant screenshots. We aim to respond within 24-48 hours.
Join the WagerProof Discord for community support, strategy discussions, and quick questions. You can access Discord from the sidebar in the app.
Have an idea for a new feature? Visit the Feature Requests page in the app to submit and vote on ideas from the community.
When contacting support, include as much detail as possible: your device type, app version, and steps to reproduce any issues. This helps us resolve things faster.
